title: The Missing Homework
ticket: Sarah says she saved her homework but can't find it.
clue: She remembers clicking Save but not where.
tooltip: Files live inside folders. Documents is the default save location.
whyItMatters: Users constantly lose files. IT must find them quickly.
careerConnection: Help Desk techs solve lost file issues daily.

interactiveDemo.hint: Start with the default save location.

breakFixTask: Homework.docx is in Downloads. Move it to Documents.
explainQuestions: How would you help someone find a file?
verificationChecklist: Can you do it without hints?
ticketCompletion: Sarah sees her homework in Documents.
